compiled_state.title: Add enrich-in-place path to brainstorm SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Modify plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md to add:

1. A new "## Enrich-in-Place Path" section that defines the streamlined enrichment flow:
   - Streamlined Socratic dialogue: ask 1-3 targeted questions to clarify the ticket intent (NOT the full Phase 1 multi-area probe)
   - Update the existing ticket description via .claude/scripts/dso ticket edit <id> --description="<enriched content>" with:
     - Structured acceptance criteria (Given/When/Then or bullet list)
     - Approach summary (1-2 sentences on how to implement)
     - File paths if the ticket references modules/functions/directories resolvable in the repo (use Glob/Grep)
   - Explicitly skip: fidelity review (Step 2.5/3), scenario analysis (Step 2.75), web research (Step 2.6), ticket creation (Phase 3), complexity evaluation (Phase 3 Step 4a), routing to downstream skills (/dso:preplanning, /dso:implementation-plan)
   - Preserve the ticket original type (no type change)
   - After enrichment, present the updated ticket and stop — no automatic downstream dispatch
2. Wire the Type Detection Gate (from story 9960-138a) enrich option to this section
3. Remove RED marker [test_enrich_section_exists] from .test-index (keep the test entry)

IMPORTANT: Use ticket edit --description= (not ticket comment) to update the ticket description field. This matches Done Definition 1 which says "updates the existing ticket's description."

## File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md (add Enrich-in-Place Path section)
- MODIFY: .test-index (remove RED marker from brainstorm SKILL.md line)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 4 tests in test-brainstorm-enrich-in-place.sh pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-enrich-in-place.sh; test $? -eq 0
- [ ] SKILL.md contains enrich-in-place section
  Verify: grep -qi 'enrich.*in.*place\|enrich.*path' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Enrich section includes ticket edit --description for updating the ticket
  Verify: grep -q 'ticket edit' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Enrich section includes structured acceptance criteria update
  Verify: grep -qi 'acceptance criteria\|approach summary\|file paths' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Enrich section explicitly skips epic-specific phases
  Verify: grep -qi 'skip.*fidelity\|skip.*scenario\|skip.*ticket creation\|skip.*complexity' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Enrich section preserves ticket type
  Verify: grep -qi 'type.*unchanged\|retain.*type\|preserve.*type\|original type' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index
  Verify: ! grep -q '\[test_enrich_section_exists\]' .test-index
- [ ] Test entry (without marker) still exists in .test-index
  Verify: grep -q 'test-brainstorm-enrich-in-place.sh' .test-index
- [ ] Skill file is valid markdown
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — SKILL.md has Convert-to-Epic Path section, need to add Enrich-in-Place Path after it; Option (b) currently has inline 3-step instructions; .test-index has RED marker [test_enrich_section_exists] to remove
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — Added ## Enrich-in-Place Path section to SKILL.md with Socratic dialogue instructions, ticket edit --description, structured AC/approach/file paths, explicit phase skips, and ticket type preservation; updated Option (b) to reference new section; removed RED marker from .test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Acceptance criteria verified ✓ — All 4 tests pass (12/12 assertions GREEN); all 8 ACs verified via grep commands
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Enrich-in-place path added to SKILL.md
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
